response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, including some C++ work early in his career (e.g., National Instruments) and strong performance in multi-threaded, low-latency systems (Dlang at Dunnhumby). However, his recent work is heavily focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang, with minimal recent C++ experience. His lack of direct exposure to industrial automation, secure development lifecycle (SDL), or IEC 62443 standards raises concerns about his fit for the role, though his broad technical skills and open-source contributions are notable.
strengths: Strong background in multi-threaded, high-performance systems (Dlang at Dunnhumby)
Experience with C++ early in career (National Instruments, LabWindows/CVI)
Open-source contributions and mentorship in software craftsmanship (refactoring dojos, CI/CD)
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last significant work ~20 years ago)
No demonstrated exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or SDL
Lacks experience in industrial automation protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, etc.) or cloud platforms (Azure)
